case_title: LIANETTE HOLLIE VS. NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO PLAINTIFF???S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.???S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS (COMMENT) (TRANSACTION ID # 210040201) FILED BY DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUN-29-2023. HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'SMOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing RE: Defendant Nissan North America, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration.

Appearances (via Zoom):

Camran Pakbaz, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP, (310) 933-4271, for Plaintiff.

Andres F. Michel, Wilson Turner Kosmo, LLP, (619) 236-9600, for Defendant.

Ruling - ARGUED. At the conclusion of argument, the court confirms the following tentative ruling:

Defendant Nissan North America, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
